title: nephrodium fraserianum
intro: Nephrodium fraserianum, also known as the Fraser's maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, Nephrodium fraserianum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to promote health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and boosting the immune system.
